title: readiness-register
description: Completeness (0–3) and quality (0–2) scores per module, domain-level aggregates, and overall Readiness Track score. Produced by scorer. Consumed by gap-analyst, qaqc-agent, output agents.

quality_score.description: 0=Not applicable or unverifiable, 1=Credible but unverified, 2=Verified or independently corroborated

combined_score.description: Normalised combined readiness score for this module (0–1.0). Calculated by score_calculator.py.

research_resolution_applied.description: Whether external research was used to partially resolve an absent or fragmentary module.

scoring_basis.description: Basis on which this module was scored.

weighted_readiness_score.description: Weighted aggregate readiness score for this domain (0–1.0). Calculated by score_calculator.py.

overall_readiness_score.description: Overall Readiness Track score, normalised to 0–1.0. Weighted by domain importance. Calculated by score_calculator.py.

readiness_score_percentage.description: Overall readiness score expressed as a percentage (0–100) for display purposes.
